title: Godz
description: The GODZ finally return! Bigger cast, hot new acts, and just as little clothing. If you loved the original GODZ, then the return will blow your mind. A hedonistic dive head-first into the lives of the ancient gods of Olympus! Follow your favourite gods like Cupid and Hercules as they paint the scene of Ancient Greece and bring you to the biggest party to hit Mount Olympus since 500 BCE. Your favourite group of comedy acrobats take their unique mix of storytelling, circus, and physical prowess to godlike proportions. Expect a bodyssey of gravity-defying stunts, true tests of heroic strength and muscularity, and surprise comic twists. Winner – Best Circus – Fringe World festival 2022 Winner – Critics Choice weekly – Adelaide Fringe Festival 2022 Winner – Best Circus weekly – Adelaide Fringe Festival 2022, 2023, 2024 Peoples Choice Award Melbourne Fringe 2023 Peoples Choice Award Wynnum Fringe 2023
content_warnings: Nudity, Swearing, Strobe Lighting, Haze effects, Adult themes

reviews.reviewer: By Reviewer Upload June 3, 2023 Updated: August 2, 2025 No Comments 3 Mins Read
reviews.excerpt: Conceived and performed by: Head First Acrobatics Introduced by their slightly peeved father, Zeus, four scantily-clad Grecian heroes enter the stage of the humid, buzzing Brighton Spiegeltent. Apollo, god of Sun; Dionysus, god of Wine; Cupid, god of Love; and Hercules, mere demigod, arrive in the human form of four Aussie acrobats from the award-winning Melbourne-based Head First Acrobats.
